Interface IGeometryDefEdit

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that modify the geometry definition.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("439A0D51-3915-11D1-9CA7-0000F8780619")]
public interface IGeometryDefEdit : IGeometryDef
